query: SELECT id, HEX(SUBSTRING(nomeCompleto, 1, 3)) as hex_start, LENGTH(nomeCompleto) as len, CHAR_LENGTH(nomeCompleto) as charlen, nomeCompleto FROM employees WHERE deletedAt IS NULL ORDER BY id LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute SELECT id, HEX(SUBSTRING(nomeCompleto, 1, 3)) as hex_start, LENGTH(nomeCompleto) as len, CHAR_LENGTH(nomeCompleto) as charlen, nomeCompleto FROM employees WHERE deletedAt IS NULL ORDER BY id LIMIT 5;
